description_long: This object is a modern computer monitor with a wide, flat rectangular display framed by a moderately thick bezel. The bezel is matte black and features slightly rounded corners, giving the monitor a contemporary look. The screen is supported by a robust, polygonal pedestal stand that appears stable and solid, with a broad circular base for support. The rear of the monitor is plain, with a central support arm connecting the display to the base, and no visible buttons or ports. The overall finish is sleek and uniform, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The monitor's design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in offices, public kiosks, or urban workspaces.
description: A sleek, matte black computer monitor with a wide rectangular screen and a sturdy polygonal pedestal stand. The design is modern, with a thick bezel and no visible branding or controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display with a thick matte black bezel and the polygonal pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the screen and the depth of the circular base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the central support arm connecting to the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's thickness and the angular connection between the screen and the base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. There are no color contrasts or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a polygonal pedestal type with a broad, circular base and a central support arm, all in matte black plastic with a solid, stable appearance.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
